data.title: Conference on human–computer interaction
data.authors: Cuauhtémoc Rivera Loaiza, J Smith, M Johnson
data.description: Stress is a biological phenomenon affecting both men and women at a physiological and psychological level. While everybody can be impacted by stress, studies have shown that women are more likely to be affected by daily stressors [20, 21]. Gender differences concerning stress include biological and social factors. Life transitions such as menarche, pregnancy, childbirth, postpartum, motherhood, and
